title: SequenceFile Entry Management
description: The 'lib/output/committer/manifest/impl' directory contains 'EntryFileIO.java', managing 'FileEntry' objects in SequenceFiles. It uses a blocking queue and a dedicated thread for writing, implementing the Producer pattern. 'EntryFileIO' interacts with Hadoop's SequenceFile class for file management, utilizing multi-threading for efficient I/O. It provides methods for creating writers and readers, iterating over entries, and managing a writer thread for queuing and processing entries for writing.
